name: GaaS/CaaS/PaaS - Governance, Coordination & Payment Architecture
description: Three tightly integrated services forming the enterprise backbone: GaaS (Governance as a Service) for contract compliance and 7-tier authority cascade, CaaS (Coordination as a Service) for takt planning and trade sequencing, and PaaS (Payment as a Service) for AIA G702/G703 payment applications with retainage management.

before.governance: Manual compliance tracking, scattered decision authority
before.coordination: Excel-based takt planning, no real-time visibility
before.payment: Paper-based AIA forms, manual retainage calculation

after.governance: Automated 7-tier authority cascade with spatial decision attachment
after.coordination: 3D takt zones with real-time wagon tracking and flow optimization
after.payment: Automated G702/G703 generation with lien waiver validation

value.complianceTracking: Automated charter validation against AIA, OSHA, carbon budgets
value.taktPlanning: Real-time conflict detection and route optimization
value.paymentProcessing: Automated retainage calculation and lien waiver tracking

services.name: GaaS (Governance as a Service)
services.purpose: Contract compliance, decision authority, regulatory enforcement

services.name: CaaS (Coordination as a Service)
services.purpose: Takt planning, trade sequencing, flow optimization

services.name: PaaS (Payment as a Service)
services.purpose: AIA G702/G703 payment applications, retainage, lien waivers

milestones.name: Foundation
milestones.description: Compliance Charter schema, 7-tier authority cascade, takt zone creation, G702/G703 generation

milestones.name: Carbon Integration
milestones.description: Carbon budget enforcement, Buy Clean CA validation, carbon offset voxel attribution

milestones.name: Advanced Coordination
milestones.description: Takt wagon route optimization, PostGIS conflict detection, crew allocation optimization, EFAS integration

milestones.name: IPD & Risk Sharing
milestones.description: Target cost tracking, IPD voting sessions, risk pool allocation, incentive compensation
